title: Bodmin Magic

description.text: This enchanting project took me to the Bodmin Moor in Cornwall. The task was to bring the natural beauty of the surrounding countryside, indoors. The energy on this land is pure, clear and peaceful.

I love tapping into and exploring the worlds and energies of the places I paint in and people that commission me to do so. It really makes every project I do so different and unique as it is customized for that specific space. It's one of a kind.

location: Dining Room. Private Home. Cornwall, UK
